title: Bank Teller

rationales.taskAutomation: Deposits, withdrawals, transfers, and basic account inquiries are routine transaction processing that ATMs, mobile apps, and AI chat/voice banking already handle at scale.
rationales.toolMaturity: Mobile banking, ITMs (interactive teller machines), and AI chat banking are mature, widely deployed products across nearly all major banks.
rationales.adoption: Mainstream: most routine transactions have already shifted to self-service and mobile channels at large and mid-size banks.
rationales.agenticExposure: Routine transaction handling and basic account servicing form a scripted interaction pipeline agents and self-service kiosks already own.

tasksAtRisk: Basic account balance and transaction inquiries
tasksGrowing: Cross-selling complex financial products in person
Resolving complex or disputed transaction issues
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 43-3071 (Tellers), p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: Complex product cross-selling and financial guidance

insight: Branch teller headcount has been shrinking for over a decade as mobile and ATM/ITM channels absorb routine transactions, and AI-driven self-service accelerates that shift further.
